-module(solve).
-export([solve/1]).

solve(Str) ->
    List = binary_to_list(Str),
    Acc = process(List, []),
    lists:join("", [<<C>> || C <- Acc]).

process([], Acc) ->
    Acc;
process([Char | Rest], Acc) ->
    case Char of
        $* -> process(Rest, drop_last(Acc));
        $# -> process(Rest, Acc ++ Acc);
        $% -> process(Rest, lists:reverse(Acc));
        _ -> process(Rest, Acc ++ [Char])
    end.

drop_last(List) ->
    case List of
        [] -> [];
        _ -> lists:sublist(List, length(List) - 1)
    end.
```
